title: Is anyone going to the LA screenings
display_title: Is anyone going to the LA screenings
wikitext:
[]: Is anyone going to the LA screenings?             Quote Post by thingstodoinla1 » Sat Jan 22, 2011 12:10 am I'm going to the one on friday28th at 9pm at the downtown independent, the theater told me this showing was getting the most purchases. one week only [url]http://coveroutofnowhere.blogspot.com/2010/12/evangelion-20-you-can-not-advance-in-la.html[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by SurferJon » Sat Jan 22, 2011 7:39 pm Is the movie dubbed in English or subbed?

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sun Jan 23, 2011 12:36 am I wish, but I can't afford to drive to LA

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sun Jan 23, 2011 9:15 pm SurferJon wrote: Is the movie dubbed in English or subbed?
